content: After some pull session these are few awakeners that I got, I still have some more standard pull that I'm saving. I tried to pull for Saya, but of course my luck is really bad by losing 2 times, and still didn't get her yet as of now. So which team can help me progress the story easily?
+ Doll at the bottom

Hello there : )
You should have more than enough cores to pull Saya at least once given the current limited cores giveaway event.

[AT LEAST 160 FREE STANDARD PULLS]

Go to the thread below for helpful Beginner guides and Redemption codes 

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1509396840330825758/1509396840330825758

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:
## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri
- [Game Mechanics](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
I haven't go through the story that much yet, so I didn't get the currency yet to guarantee her
That asides, you can get started with Murphy-Faros-Agripa-Faint for starters and get a feel of how aequor and caro work
Let me try that. And how about Sanga? I did get her... alot

You can go with full aequor or swap Faros and Agripa for Sanga and Helot.
Sanga if a fait shielder who cqn dish out some damage with her exalt. You can check the effect of her enlightenment for how dupes strenghtened her.
And of course I wanted to pull for Saya, is there any awakeners that I need to keep in mind for her team?
Thaïs is great with her in my opinion and I usually couple her with Corposant ( reruns next week ) and a support aequor ( Caecus, Murphy, Myriam, Celeste, ... )
You could also try with Cassiah if you don't want to spend your etheral cores on Corpo
And you will get Aurita for free as you progress in the game
So I think I don't need to pull for the aequor anymore right?
Finally, if you're intested in Pontos he shuld be a fine addition to a shuffle team

Well, I do recommand getting a few ultra to feel out their specific gameplay.
Pulling Myriam might be nice but Murphy will indeed get you through the first few chapters
Should I get Myriam first or Thais?

I'd say Thaïs *but* I wouldn't use selectors.
You can save these for as long as you can, give you time to actually find out who you want most.
Thaïs really shines with her third enlightenment. Myriam is already pretty usefull without dupes.

Miryam guides:

Nechromicon-<https://youtube.com/shorts/Vapqe7a_Ih0?si=Heu8IrmweW8ZRa9p>
 
All opinions and views expressed in these guides belong to the content creator and are not officially endorsed
Oh I also want to ask, what's the idea of Sanga and Helot together?
Can work. Helot is pretty straightforward, you'll mostly want to get strength and shield from your supports.
You'll get stronger dps later though
Don't be afraid to let yiur HP fall low with a caro team : ghe lower it gets, the more efficient the furnace and embryo generation.
So basically shield the queen type of situation

Im trying to put a Ghelot team together myself I posted everything in the next Newcomer thread haha. This has been helpful but maybe my line up is different the story difficulty is ramping up at chapter 6 for sure. I have Sanga though so maybe walling for my Ghelot will work.
Can I technically pick Casiah with selector instead?
got Saya now
Can I use this team now?

Hii!! just started 2 weeks ago and i have 2 char & wod dupes thingy + 2 of the char & wod perm selector, who should i use it for or should i wait for other units? I'm planning to pull pollux<:Aurita_please:1356053110375714817>

Hello there : )

My advice here is simple : check if they expire and keep then in your stash for a while.
You will get to try all four realms ( and their variantions ) and decide for yourself who your favorite awakeners are.
Who would be the best team here to push for the story. I did get Clementine since it was suggested! Should I pull for anyone else? Maybe Hamln?
Helot is not GHelot ! Their gameplays are somewhat different and Helot:catena needs more carefull managment I'd say
Sanga is OK but there should be more options around. Murphy is definitely a favorite af mine, along with Wanda.

Ghelot guides:

Angbak- <https://www.reddit.com/r/Morimens/s/Fkzk7kBkLZ>
Fibrinogen- <https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1DffjQ3s4CMvUij2CbTDE6Pnvl-XaQR4Os7y8QJ6dQ2E/edit?slide=id.p#slide=id.p>
 
All opinions and views expressed in these guides belong to the content creator and are not officially endorsed

Cassiah can be access through pure cores ( the standard banner ) which you will have in abundance.
I strongly advise *against* using the selector for any non-limited awakener.
But yes, it is *technically* possible.

Bit tanky. You want someone to deal direct damage with Saya's corruption. Tentacles work, but they build up slow.
Aurita will be a fine option ( and you can take off either Sanga or Murphy but I would leave Faint for the heal ). Until then, Goliath should work too
Celeste and Faros both trigger tentacle attacks with their skills so they light be worth considering too ( needs enlightenment )

Saya guides:

Kaly - <https://youtu.be/74kwJnNMXOk?si=YWS1EMlAF0SViscG>
Poppy - https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1514650465458065459/1514650465458065459
